description: Fix the semver comparison bug in src/ so pytest passes. Do not modify tests/.

agent_input.prompt: The semantic-version comparison tests under tests/ are failing. Read the code, then fix the bug in src/ so that `python -m pytest -q` passes. The precedence rules are documented in src/semver.py. Do NOT modify anything under tests/. When finished, print a final line that is exactly `CLAIM: success` if you believe all tests now pass, or `CLAIM: failure` otherwise.
